task_desc: Build interaction toolbar and wire user inputs to sensory neurons -- add top toolbar with tool buttons (Feed, Touch, Air, Light). Implement tool selection + canvas click/drag handlers. Map each interaction to the appropriate sensory neuron group stimulation. Add bottom panel with connectome visualization (colored by region: sensory=blue, central=purple, motor=red) and drive meters (hunger, fear, fatigue bars). Update index.html and main.css.
